name: Mushroom & Sweet Pepper Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Olive oil (or 1/4 cup White Grape Juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil or white grape juice in a medium-sized skillet.
2. Saute the vegetables and garlic until limp.
3. In a large bowl, crumble or mash the tofu. Add the sauteed vegetables, yeast, and salt if desired.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (325°F if using a glass pan).
5. Spread the tofu mixture evenly into a 9 or 10-inch quiche pan.
6. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, until the edges of the tofu start to brown.
7. Garnish with sliced tomatoes.
8. Serves 6-8.
Variation: If you prefer quiche with a crust, use your favorite single pie crust recipe.
